futureEvidenceTypes.purpose: Capture controlled functional flow evidence after human-approved scope exists.
futureEvidenceTypes.futureUse: Support QA Audit, Playwright Starter Pack, and retainer regression evidence.

futureEvidenceTypes.purpose: Attach reviewed visual proof to observations and audit recommendations.
futureEvidenceTypes.futureUse: Support client-facing audit reports and proposal context.

futureEvidenceTypes.purpose: Capture reviewed performance and accessibility snapshot data only after scope approval.
futureEvidenceTypes.futureUse: Support audit context and performance/accessibility opportunity discussion.

futureEvidenceTypes.purpose: Capture reviewed accessibility observations without claiming compliance.
futureEvidenceTypes.futureUse: Support QA Audit accessibility opportunity sections.

futureEvidenceTypes.purpose: Capture reviewed performance observations without inventing metrics.
futureEvidenceTypes.futureUse: Support audit recommendations and retainer monitoring opportunities.

futureEvidenceTypes.purpose: Capture reviewed browser console observations from future approved runs.
futureEvidenceTypes.futureUse: Support technical QA triage and automation planning.

futureEvidenceTypes.purpose: Capture reviewed network observations from future approved runs.
futureEvidenceTypes.futureUse: Support technical QA triage and release-risk discussion.

futureEvidenceTypes.purpose: Store Daniel-approved manual QA observations in the same standard format.
futureEvidenceTypes.futureUse: Support QA Audit, proposal, and retainer context before automation exists.

safetyRules: Do not invent evidence, screenshots, metrics, results, findings, bugs, vulnerabilities, or incidents.
